channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree is overgrown and obscuring the pavement, 4th July
item.description:
Tree requires pruning as it is obscuring the pavement and dangerously growing around electricity wires

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tremaine Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped vegetation, 4th July
item.description:
Prunings dumped next to 74 Kirkton

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirkton Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in bushes/green area, 4th July
item.description:
Lots of litter in and around green space under shopping centre sign. I would suggest installing a bin around this area to prevent. In the meantime, please clear away. It has been like this for 6+ months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deal Porters Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all over Salcombe Road & Pellerin Road, 4th July
item.description:
The barrow beat cleaners never quite make it to Salcombe Road or Pellerin Road, there’s litter, broken glass etc. that’s been there for several days now…. Not only is it unsightly but it’s dangerous.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bed base, 4th July
item.description:
Dumped bed base

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding Needed, 4th July
item.description:
Weeding Needed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Ashmere Grove, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: Weeding Needed, 4th July
item.description:
Weeding Needed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Ashmere Grove, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: Weeding Needed, 4th July
item.description:
Weeding Needed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Ashmere Grove, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: Weeding Needed, 4th July
item.description:
Weeding Needed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Acre Lane, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned and untaxed vehicle blocking entrance, 4th July
item.description:
This Mercedes K26 EEE has been abandoned behind the shops on Chislehurst High Street, behind the Beauty Rooms, for about 3 months now. The car is not taxed or MOT’d and several signs have been left on the vehicle requesting the owner to move it. The car has not moved once since it arrived and nobody has claimed ownership of vehicle. It is blocking the entrance to P J Harte building too.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Empress Drive, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation blocking pavement, 4th July
item.description:
Growth around tree is now making pavement impassable for those with buggies or wheelchairs and is therefore hazardous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amounts of litter and bin bags all along Kingsland Road, 4th July
item.description:
This is a systemic issue that happens daily… mass amounts of bin bags left piled high all along the pavements, litter strewn all over the place… no wonder people contribute to it, it’s like living in a dump and has to be reviewed ASAP.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Norman Park LBB Recycling bins - what a mess, 4th July
item.description:
Rubbish piling up. Bins full. Litter and rubbish around and behind bins. Welcome to Bromley. So depressing to see. Apparently you will fine people who flytip… how’s that going then? Maybe keeping on top of emptying the bins will mean people won’t have to flytip. Just a thought.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Farm Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing utility cover, 4th July
item.description:
This utility cover is missing and I'm concerned that someone could step into the hole and fall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car Abondoned, 4th July
item.description:
This car has been in the same spot, no movement, looks abandoned for months. Others need to park there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Somerfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large suitcase with rubbish inside dumped on Seal Street E8 (pedestrian section), 4th July
item.description:
Hello, please can you remove the dumped suitcase with rubbish inside left on Seal Street E8 (pedestrian section)? Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seal Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Winifred road. Erith, 4th July
item.description:
Fridge outside 16 winifred ,eritj da8 1aj and rubbish at the side of 23 winifred road erith da8 1aj, they are both hmos

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mildred Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parking blocking disabled ramps, 4th July
item.description:
Cars across St Anthony’s school parking illegally and blocking disabled ramp needed for disabled residents of which we have a few. This is a daily issue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Etherow Street, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very inconsiderate parking, 4th July
item.description:
This irresponsible driver climbed the pavement and the cycle lane to go to the cash point!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges on this road are overgrown., 4th July
item.description:
These haven’t been cut this year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 109, Burrfield Drive, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
